tags.inscription: Here lived the architects Augs Charles Pugin born 1762 : died 1832, Augs Welby N. Pugin born 1812 : died 1852

tags.note: Plaque is of the same design as the Sir Johnston Forbes-Robertson plaque on Bedford Square and Topham/Lady Beauclerk further east on this street.
tags.note:inscription: Augs is an abbreviation for Augustus. The s of Augs is smaller (a superior letter) and has a small line underneath to indicate an abbreviation.
